name: Barbequed Garlic Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken in half lengthwise and remove bones if desired.
2. Crush garlic with salt to form a smooth puree.
3. Coarsely crush peppercorns using a mortar and pestle or blender.
4. Combine crushed peppercorns, coriander, and lime juice in a flat dish.
5. Rub the mixture thoroughly onto the chicken on all sides. Cover and refrigerate overnight or at least one hour.
6. BBQ the chicken over glowing coals, turning about every 5 minutes until it is no longer pink and the skin is crisp.
7. Garnish with tomatoes and curls of scallions.
8. Serve with a salad made from cucumber, scallions, and tomatoes seasoned with lime and salt.
